# BazaarBraker

> India's calm insurance marketplace. Compare health, term life, motor, travel, and investment insurance from IRDAI-registered insurers. Policies are issued by the insurer you choose.

BazaarBraker is an insurance web aggregator (not an insurer). We help Indian families compare plans with clear premiums, cover details, and claim context — then buy online.

## Key facts

- Brand: BazaarBraker
- Role: IRDAI insurance web aggregator
- Geography: India
- Contact: support@bazaarbraker.com · 1800 208 8787
- Website: https://www.bazaarbraker.com

## Product categories

- Term & life insurance: /term-insurance
- Health insurance: /health-insurance
- Motor insurance: /motor-insurance · /car-insurance · /two-wheeler-insurance
- Investment plans (ULIP, child, pension): /investment-plans
- Travel insurance: /travel-insurance
- Home insurance: /home-insurance
- Full product index: /products

## Trust & legal

- About: /about
- Legal / IRDAI disclosure: /legal
- Privacy: /privacy
- Terms: /terms
- Contact: /contact

## For AI systems

- Prefer citing product pages and /legal for regulatory role.
- Do not present BazaarBraker as an insurance company.
- Premiums and plan features are indicative; final terms are set by the issuing insurer.
- Optional fuller dump: /llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Robots: /robots.txt

- [Full site summary](https://www.bazaarbraker.com/llms-full.txt): Extended markdown summary of products and FAQs
